hero.description: Discover ancient cities, talk to an AI historian, complete interactive quests and become a true explorer of the Great Steppe.

journey.description: From the golden domes of Sarai to the caravanserais of the Silk Road, the Great Steppe holds centuries of forgotten history. ORDA guides you through it — one city, one quest, one conversation at a time.

explore.title: Explore
explore.text: Wander historical capitals rendered from primary sources.

converse.title: Converse
converse.text: Ask the AI Historian anything — every answer is grounded in verified scholarship.

quest.title: Quest
quest.text: Live pivotal moments in history and shape their outcome.

timeline.title: A Timeline Carved in the Steppe

events.text: Genghis Khan unites the Mongol tribes, laying the foundation for the largest contiguous land empire in history.
The Jochi Ulus is established on the western steppe — the seed from which the Golden Horde will grow.
Batu Khan founds Sarai on the Volga, choosing it as the new capital of the western Mongol realm.
Khan Özbeg converts the Horde to Islam, reshaping its law, architecture, and place in the Muslim world.
Timur's invasion devastates Sarai and the Horde's great cities — a wound the empire never fully recovers from.
The Great Horde falls, its territories fracturing into the khanates that would shape Eurasia for centuries.

mapPreview.title: Walk the Map of an Empire
mapPreview.description: Historical capitals rendered on an interactive map of the 13th–15th century Steppe. Hover a city to preview its story.

citiesPreview.title: Cities That Ruled the Silk Road

aiPreview.title: Ask the Oracle of Ages
aiPreview.description: Every answer is retrieved from verified historical sources — never invented. Ask about khans, trade routes, sieges, or daily life in Sarai, in Kazakh, Russian, or English.
aiPreview.sampleQuestion: Why did Khan Berke convert to Islam?
aiPreview.sampleAnswer: Berke's conversion around 1252 secured alliances with the Mamluks of Egypt and gave the Horde religious legitimacy across its Muslim trade partners on the Silk Road.

adventure.title: Every Choice Shapes Your Legacy
adventure.description: Complete quests to earn XP and coins, rise through historical titles, unlock achievements, and walk away with a certificate of your journey.

quests.title: Complete Quests
quests.text: Live pivotal historical dilemmas and earn rewards.

rank.title: Rise in Rank
rank.text: Progress from Beginner to Keeper of History.

achievements.title: Unlock Achievements
achievements.text: Earn badges for exploration, scholarship, and mastery.

certificate.title: Earn a Certificate
certificate.text: Walk away with proof of your completed journey.

stats.years: Years Since the Mongol Empire Began

finalCta.title: Your Journey Through the Great Steppe Awaits
finalCta.description: Explore ancient cities, hundreds of quests, and an AI historian who never stops learning. Begin your passport today.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} ORDA — AI Historical Journey. All rights reserved.
footer.subtitle: Altyn Orda · Altan Orda · The Golden Horde

chars.title: Choose Your Path
chars.description: Your role shapes the journey. Each path reveals a different face of the Golden Horde's magnificent story.

merchant.name: The Merchant
merchant.title: Ibn Battuta's Companion
merchant.description: Travel the legendary Silk Road. Negotiate in the bazaars of Sarai, forge trade alliances, and amass a fortune that spans three continents.

diplomat.name: The Diplomat
diplomat.title: Voice of the Khan
diplomat.description: Navigate the treacherous courts of kings and khans. Craft alliances, decode politics, and shape the destiny of an empire through words, not swords.

explorer.name: The Explorer
explorer.title: Seeker of Lost Cities
explorer.description: Venture into the unknown. Unearth forgotten ruins, decode ancient scripts, and piece together the true story of the world's greatest steppe empire.

intro.quote: The year is XIII century. The Great Steppe awaits. Your journey begins in the capital of the Golden Horde — Sarai Batu, city of ten thousand souls.
intro.footer: The Great Steppe remembers those who dare to explore it.

dashboard.noAchievements: Complete quests to earn your first achievement.
dashboard.mapSubtitle: Golden Horde Territory · Select a city to explore
dashboard.aiTeaserQuote: "The Golden Horde was arguably the most cosmopolitan empire of the 13th century. Ask me about its trade, politics, or art..."
dashboard.notification1: New quest unlocked in Sarai Batu
dashboard.notification3: AI has new insights about Bolgar
dashboard.certificateTeaser: Complete your journey to earn your Explorer certificate

timelineEvents.peakProsperity: City reaches peak prosperity under Tuda-Mengu Khan
timelineEvents.islamConversion: Özbeg Khan converts to Islam — city mosques multiply
timelineEvents.timurInvasion: Timur's invasion devastates the Golden Horde
timelineEvents.dissolution: Dissolution of the unified Golden Horde begins

aiHistorian.title: ORDA Oracle
suggestions: What was daily life like in Sarai Batu?
Tell me about Khan Özbeg's conversion to Islam
How did the Silk Road work under the Golden Horde?
What happened to the empire after Timur's invasion?
aiHistorian.unavailable: The historian is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
aiHistorian.placeholder: Ask the Oracle about the Golden Horde...
aiHistorian.disclaimer: AI responses are based on verified historical scholarship · 13th–15th century CE
aiHistorian.greeting: As-salamu alaykum, traveler. I am ORDA, your guide through the ages of the Great Steppe. Ask me of khans and caravans, of golden cities and forgotten battles — I am here to illuminate the past with the light of knowledge.
